title: HMAC_MD5digest
text: HMAC_MD5digest Produce a HMAC digest for the purpose of message authentification using MD5 as hashing function. extern void HMAC_MD5digest(unsigned char* Text , int TextLen , unsigned char* Key , int KeyLen , unsigned char Digest [16]); Parameters Parameter Direction Description Text IN Data stream for which the digest is to be produced TextLen IN Length of the data stream Key IN Authentication key KeyLen IN Length of the authentication key Digest OUT 16 byte digest Use Library uenc Description This function is useful for creating security drivers that need to encode and decode data.
